name: multisport-platform
description: Multi-sport scoring and rankings platform with MERN stack and GSAP animations

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client

author: MultiSport Team
